message:
fix(vfs): make posix_lock() generic over platform lock type constants

Refactor posix_lock() to accept `impl Into<i32>` for the lock_type
parameter instead of hardcoded i32, accommodating cross-platform
differences (i32 on Linux, i16 on macOS). Uses explicit cast to
libc::c_short for the flock struct field and replaces SEEK_SET
constant with literal 0 to avoid cross-platform type mismatch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
